focus: Evaluate dedicated Hugging Face retrieval embeddings after local Llama/Ollama embeddings and pointwise LTR failed to beat refined PRF.
reason_started: GEN-019 showed chat-model embeddings were weak, and GEN-020/GEN-021 showed LTR needs stronger features before promotion.
reason_ended: BGE embeddings beat refined PRF offline in vector/hybrid retrieval and LTR features, but remote OpenSearch vector/hybrid validation is still required before promotion.

validators_executed.name: npm run embed:cranfield -- --provider huggingface
validators_executed.evidence: Generated 768-dimensional BGE embeddings for 1,400 documents and 225 queries.

validators_executed.name: npm run eval:cranfield:vector
validators_executed.evidence: BGE vector and hybrid evaluations completed for graded nDCG@10 and binary nDCG@20.

validators_executed.name: npm run eval:cranfield:ltr
validators_executed.evidence: Coordinate and boosted-tree LTR with BGE features completed under query-grouped cross-validation.

validators_executed.name: npm run validate
validators_executed.evidence: Node tests, MDE parser, traceability validation through GEN-022, fixture index check, and fixture evaluation passed. Final run is recorded in VAL-032.

validators_skipped.name: remote OpenSearch vector/hybrid validation
validators_skipped.reason: Deferred to the next generation because GEN-022 establishes offline evidence and leaves the public/default architecture unchanged.

validators_skipped.name: Cloudflare deploy verification
validators_skipped.reason: No deployment was requested; GEN-022 leaves the public/default architecture unchanged.

evidence_quality_notes: BGE is the first embedding path to beat refined PRF offline.
The simple BGE hybrid path has the best binary nDCG@20 and is easier to validate remotely than BGE LTR.
BGE LTR has the best graded nDCG@10 but requires more runtime/model complexity.
No public/default architecture changed in GEN-022.
